overview.description: AI/NLP solutions for news media — semantic tagging, analytics, article generation, and RAG-based research
overview.description_long: Geneea brings AI to the newsroom. Since 2014, they've helped publishers automate routine work and gain deeper insights through advanced NLP and generative AI. They deliver industry-leading metadata enrichment with entities and IPTC Media Topics, smart workflow automation, deep content analytics, and GenAI solutions such as archive-aware agentic RAG and custom AI development. Products include Newsroom Assistant, Semantic Tagger, Article Generator, Analytics, and a Research Assistant (RAG over news archives). Trusted by Mediahuis, The Atlantic, RTS, The Hindu, Czech News Agency, Radio France, iDNES, and Seznam. Processes 1M+ articles and assigns 10M+ tags daily.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2014 by Jiří (Jirka) Hana, an NLP expert with 20+ years of software development experience, starting with a team of four to build the Interpretor general NLP platform.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague, team of four; first version of Interpretor NLP platform
First customer; integrated with Keboola as first third-party app in their marketplace
Cash-flow positive; first customer outside Czech Republic; first US customer
Began cooperation with Heureka; pivoted focus to media solutions
Google sponsored photo recommendation project for Czech News Agency and Economia
Full support for 8 languages; first automated election coverage for Czech News Agency
Text categorization for 90+ languages; began cooperation with Swiss RTS and Radio France
Began cooperation with The Atlantic; AI-based enrichment of WAN-IFRA Knowledge Hub
Became first official technology partner of Stibo DX; began cooperation with The Hindu and Centre France; launched JEDI interview-to-article tool; launched RAG-based Research Assistant

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Geneea's core value is deep vertical expertise in news media NLP — a 12M+ entity knowledge base, IPTC/IAB media taxonomy support, and integration with Stibo DX's CUE platform. However, foundation models can increasingly handle tagging, summarization, and article generation. Their moat is domain-specific knowledge and established integrations, not proprietary AI models.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: News media AI is a real and growing market with paying international clients including The Atlantic, Radio France, and The Hindu. Geneea has demonstrated sustained demand across two decades of operation and multiple market cycles.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Cash-flow positive since 2016 with no VC funding required. The bootstrapped model and 12-year track record indicate strong financial sustainability without reliance on external investment.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A bootstrapped, profitable company with 12+ years of operation, diversified international client base, and first-party integrations into enterprise media platforms. The medium AGI displacement risk is offset by strong client retention, domain expertise, and the company's own proactive adoption of LLMs and RAG.

metadata.notes: IČ (Czech business ID): 03241394. Company website states team of ~20-21; LinkedIn shows 15 employees. Revenue estimate of $4M USD from RocketReach snippet (2025). Jiří Hana confirmed as co-founder on LinkedIn and company website; other co-founders not publicly named. No CNAIP page found.
